# Config Correctness & Cross-Plugin Consistency Checklist: Arachne Full Command Coverage

**Purpose**: Validate that YAML config requirements are complete, unambiguous, and consistent with Apollo plugin patterns
**Created**: 2026-03-01
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 - Are all 8 user-taskable Arachne commands enumerated in the requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK002 - Is the exclusion rationale for `checkin` documented with sufficient justification? [Completeness, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK003 - Are parameter name corrections specified for all 3 broken commands (download, upload, execute_assembly)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001/002/003]
- [ ] CHK004 - Are the 5 unchanged commands (shell, pwd, ls, rm) confirmed as already correct, or is correctness assumed without verification? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK005 - Is the metadata schema (agent_version field) fully specified with expected value and format? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 - Is "Mythic file reference (file_id)" in FR-002/FR-003 unambiguous — does it clearly indicate a string containing a UUID from `core_upload_file`? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK007 - Is "annotated as Windows-only" in FR-004/FR-005 specific about where the annotation appears (description text, YAML field, or both)? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK008 - Does the spec distinguish between "Windows only" (cd) and "Windows/ASPX only" (execute_assembly) with clear definitions of each restriction? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004/005]
- [ ] CHK009 - Is the source of truth for "correct Mythic parameter names" explicitly identified (reference agent source path or version)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK010 - Is the upload parameter pattern (file_id as string) consistent between the Arachne contract and Apollo's upload command on 007 branch? [Consistency, Contract §upload]
- [ ] CHK011 - Is the execute_assembly parameter pattern consistent with how Apollo handles assembly execution (noting intentional differences: Arachne=inline file, Apollo=pre-registered name)? [Consistency, Contract §execute_assembly]
- [ ] CHK012 - Is the download parameter name (`file_path`) consistent with Apollo's download parameter naming convention? [Consistency, Contract §download]
- [ ] CHK013 - Is the description text pattern for file_id parameters ("Use file_id from core_upload_file...") consistent between Arachne upload and execute_assembly? [Consistency]
- [ ] CHK014 - Is the metadata section structure (agent_version) consistent with Apollo's metadata pattern from 007 branch? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 - Is SC-001 ("pass parameter validation") measurable without a live Mythic instance (e.g., unit test loadable)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK016 - Is SC-004 ("no parameter mismatches") defined with a specific comparison method (manual diff, automated check, reference file hash)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK017 - Are success criteria for platform restriction correctness (FR-004/FR-005) measurable given the YAML schema lacks per-command OS fields? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK018 - Are requirements defined for what happens when an operator calls a file-parameter command without first uploading via `core_upload_file`? [Coverage, Gap]
- [ ] CHK019 - Are error scenario requirements specified for invalid file_id values passed to upload/execute_assembly? [Coverage, Edge Case]
- [ ] CHK020 - Are requirements defined for the operator workflow of discovering that `cd` is Windows-only (error message? documentation? tool filtering)? [Coverage, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK021 - Is the edge case "upload with file exceeding webshell size limits" specified with expected behavior or explicitly deferred? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK022 - Is the edge case "execute_assembly on non-ASPX callback" specified with expected behavior or explicitly deferred? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK023 - Is the edge case "cd on Linux callback" specified with expected error behavior or explicitly deferred? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK024 - Is the assumption that "YAML loader supports file_id as string type" validated against the actual yaml_loader.py code? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK025 - Is the assumption that `execute_task()` correctly passes file_id parameters to Mythic without `file_ids` array validated? [Assumption, Research §R4]
- [ ] CHK026 - Is the Arachne agent version (0.0.4) confirmed against the actual deployed Mythic instance, not just the reference repo? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Items referencing `[Gap]` indicate potentially missing requirements
- Items referencing `[Assumption]` should be validated before implementation
- Cross-plugin consistency items compare against Apollo 007 branch patterns
